Video.summary: The countdown has begun as we prepare for some of the most extreme weather caught on camera!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here

Video.summary: From Florida's shores to Australia's outback, we traveled the world to collect videos that will blow you away.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice
Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice
Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice

Video.summary: Are you ready for some electricyfing weather videos? Because we've got it all...wind storms, flashfloods, and even hurricanes! We've pulled together some of the craziest weather you've ever seen!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway

Video.summary: Get ready, because it's time once again to watch some of the wildest weather videos you've ever seen! From thunderstorms to tornadoes, hail to flooding, we've got it all
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind

Video.summary: The world is a dangerous place, and with wild weather occurances happening every 20 seconds, it's no wonder we never have a shortage of footage to showcase here. The videos we have gathered are guarenteed to blow you away, so let's not waste anymore time and jump right into it.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind

Video.summary: What's windy, wild, and wet all over? The weather, of course!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No

Video.summary: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown

Video.summary: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide

Video.summary: Josh Morgerman traveled to Texas to be an eye-witness to Hurricane Harvey.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Harvey

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Harvey
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Harvey
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Harvey

Video.summary: In this episode, we recount three of Josh Morgerman's most intense chases throughout the country of Taiwan, and witness his years of experience aid him in avoiding catastrophe a world away.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Taiwan

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Taiwan
Mission: Hurricane | Taiwan
Mission: Hurricane | Taiwan

Video.summary: In a 1-year span, Hurricanes Laura and Ida hit one of the most hurricane prone regions of the United States.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Cajun Curse

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Cajun Curse
Mission: Hurricane | Cajun Curse
Mission: Hurricane | Cajun Curse

Video.summary: In 2022, Josh chased the deadliest hurricane to strike Florida since 1935: Category 4 Ian.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Ian

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Ian
Mission: Hurricane | Ian
Mission: Hurricane | Ian

Video.summary: Josh relives his most harrowing moments hunting the world’s most dangerous storms.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases
Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases
Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases

Video.summary: Durimg Super Typhoon Haiyan, Josh Morgerman found himself rescuing locals from its aftermath.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Super Typhoon Haiyan

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Super Typhoon Haiyan
Mission: Hurricane | Super Typhoon Haiyan
Mission: Hurricane | Super Typhoon Haiyan

Video.summary: In this episode, we recount some of Josh Morgerman's greatest chases throughout the country of Mexico, which over the years became his favorite storm hunting grounds.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Mexico’s Megastorms

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Mexico’s Megastorms
Mission: Hurricane | Mexico’s Megastorms
Mission: Hurricane | Mexico’s Megastorms

Video.summary: Josh Morgerman traveled to Texas to be an eye-witness to Hurricane Harvey.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Harvey

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Harvey
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Harvey
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Harvey

Video.summary: In 2015, Josh Morgerman traveled to Mexico to chase what would become one of the strongest tropical hurricanes ever recorded. His harrowing experience with Patricia would forever shape his identity as a Hurricane Chaser.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Patricia

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Patricia
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Patricia
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Patricia

Video.summary: In 2019, Josh Morgerman chased Hurricane Dorian in the Bahamas in what wound up becoming one of the most intense and dangerous storms he has ever encountered.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Dorian

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Dorian
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Dorian
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Dorian

Video.summary: Josh Morgerman chased 3 typhoons in 6 days, a personal record amidst the Western Pacific's destructive forces.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Hat Trick

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Hat Trick
Mission: Hurricane | Hat Trick
Mission: Hurricane | Hat Trick

Video.summary: Josh Morgerman chases devastating Hurricane Maria.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Maria

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Maria
Mission: Hurricane | Maria
Mission: Hurricane | Maria

Video.summary: In 2014, Josh went face to face with one of the most violent hurricanes ever to strike Cabo San Lucas.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Odile

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Odile
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Odile
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Odile

Video.summary: One hurricane, 2 countries, 2,000 miles. Josh chases Hurricane Fiona from the Dominican Republic to Canada.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Fiona

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Fiona
Mission: Hurricane | Fiona
Mission: Hurricane | Fiona
